title: hydrocotyle digitata
intro: Hydrocotyle digitata, also known as finger root or Indian pennywort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Araliaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle digitata include reducing anxiety and stress, improving cognitive function, and supporting liver health, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, capsules, or extracts, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Chinese medicine practices.
